eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Grant, NE; at 01:12 AM ON MAR 26, 2026 Effective until 04:12 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Due to a fast moving wildfire, the Grant County Sheriff is requiring Ashby and the surrounding area to evacuate. Evacuate to the Hyannis High School.
